approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation; EMAIL-ATTACHMENTS-001 builds the next bounded email attachment slice after DRIVE-CONTENT-001.
scopeSummary: Add bounded application/ics calendar invite text extraction, prioritize newly-supported calendar retry skips, prove explicit skip routing, and close through the existing governed email attachment lane without sends, external writes, credential mutation, or broad private extraction.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
Use existing live sprint unless proof closeout explicitly updates Current Sprint truth.
Do not send emails or external messages.
Do not mutate Gmail, Missive, Drive permissions, credentials, provider config, or keys.
Do not run broad historical private extraction outside the bounded daily quota target.
Do not add new source access, paid/provider work, or browser-auth extraction.
Do not route OCR/image/audio/video/multimodal extraction through this text-only card.
Existing governed Foundation repair/proof reruns are allowed only when they read approved source data and write local archive/ledger/proof rows only.
Approval-bound actions park the action, not the whole sprint; continue safe approved sprint work.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
